node.statement: SUBROUTINE 3B — Quantum State Preparation from Classical Vector: Given a classically computed vector u_c of dimension poly(log 1/h_f), prepare the quantum state |hat_u_c> = u_c/||u_c|| using O(poly(log 1/h_f)) gates. Uses Grover-Rudolph method (GR02) for preparing arbitrary amplitude distributions.
